response.justification: While Bogdan possesses an exceptional technical background that perfectly matches the required tech stack (TypeScript, React, AWS, LLM integrations), he is vastly overqualified for this entry-level/junior position. With over 15 years of experience and current Staff Engineer titles, his salary expectations and career trajectory will not align with a junior role. Furthermore, his location in São Paulo/Berlin likely conflicts with the strict on-site requirement.
strengths: Comprehensive expertise in the required tech stack, including TypeScript, React, Node.js, and SQL.
Strong alignment with nice-to-have skills, boasting hands-on experience with LLM agents, AWS, and Kubernetes.
Demonstrated commitment to clean software architecture, utilizing TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development.
concerns: Vastly overqualified for an entry-level role, currently holding Staff Software Engineer and Founder positions.
High flight risk and likely budget misalignment due to 15+ years of senior-level experience.
Potential location conflict with the 'high on-site presence' requirement, given his current base in São Paulo/Berlin.
